description_long: This is a modern black sedan with a sleek, streamlined body and a glossy finish. The front features a pair of angular headlights and a chrome-accented grille, while the rear is equipped with red tail lights and a subtle trunk. The side profile reveals four doors, flush door handles, and large, multi-spoke alloy wheels with a metallic sheen. The windows are tinted, giving the car a sophisticated and private appearance. The overall design is aerodynamic, with smooth curves and a low stance typical of urban sedans. The car appears to be constructed primarily from metal and glass, with rubber tires and plastic trim elements.
description: A sleek black sedan with tinted windows, chrome accents, and large alloy wheels, featuring a modern, aerodynamic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angular headlights, chrome grille, and smooth hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, flush handles, and large alloy wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the red tail lights, trunk, and subtle rear bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible alloy wheels and door outlines.
attribute_license_plate: rear, rectangular, white background, unreadable text
attribute_wheel_design: Five double-spoke alloy wheels, metallic silver color, with a modern, open design
